summary: Report a successful x402 transaction hash
description: "First call returns HTTP 402 with PAYMENT-REQUIRED. Unpaid discovery probes may send an empty JSON body to read the challenge, but paid retries must send the exact same JSON payload with valid userId and txHash. Copy challenge.resource plus challenge.accepts[0] into PAYMENT-SIGNATURE as accepted, then retry this same POST to persist the report. Default price is $0.001."

summary: Latest Ethereum block height - current chain tip via eth_blockNumber

summary: "Fetch an Ethereum block header and transaction hashes by number, tag, or hex via eth_getBlockByNumber"

summary: Simulate a read-only Ethereum contract call via eth_call - no transaction sent

summary: Ethereum chain ID (EIP-155) via eth_chainId - confirm which chain a network is on

summary: "ENS resolve - turn a .eth name into an address, or an address into its primary .eth name, via eth_call on OneSource live Ethereum RPC"

summary: "Ethereum network info - chain ID, block height, and gas price in one batched RPC call (eth_chainId + eth_blockNumber + eth_gasPrice)"

summary: "Pending Ethereum block - mempool transactions not yet mined, via eth_getBlockByNumber(""pending"")"

summary: "Transaction receipt via eth_getTransactionReceipt - status, gas, and event logs for a mined Ethereum transaction"
